title: Body of missing man found at Garden Route Dam
description: GEORGE NEWS - The body of a man who was...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The body of a man who was reported missing was discovered near the Garden Route Dam just before midnight yesterday, Friday 12 April.


> Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies said the deceased's family yesterday afternoon reported him as missing.


Police were dispatched to the scene after the body was found by a search party who pursued leads on the missing man.

"On arrival they found the man with a gunshot wound to the head.

"He was later declared dead by medical personnel on the scene. A firearm was also found on the scene," said Spies.


> The deceased is yet to be formally identified. No foul play is suspected at this stage. Investigation continues.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
